Package org.key_project.util.collection

Class DirectedGraph<V,E extends GraphEdge>

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.util.collection.DirectedGraph<V,E>
Type Parameters:
V - vertex type
E - edge type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Graph<V,E>
Direct Known Subclasses:
EquivalenceDirectedGraph
public class DirectedGraph<V,E extends GraphEdge> extends Object implements Graph<V,E>
Simple implementation of the Graph interface.

    • addVertex

      public boolean addVertex(V v)
      Description copied from interface: Graph
      Adds the specified vertex to this graph if not already present.
      Specified by:
      addVertex in interface Graph<V,E extends GraphEdge>
      Parameters:
      v - vertex to be added to this graph.
      Returns:
      true if this graph did not already contain the specified vertex.

      Description copied from interface: Graph
      Add an edge to this graph.
      Specified by:
      addEdge in interface Graph<V,E extends GraphEdge>
      Parameters:
      source - source vertex
      target - target vertex
      edge - edge

    • containsVertex

      public boolean containsVertex(V v)
      Specified by:
      containsVertex in interface Graph<V,E extends GraphEdge>
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      whether that vertex is in the graph

      public Collection<E> incomingEdgesOf(V v)
      Specified by:
      incomingEdgesOf in interface Graph<V,E extends GraphEdge>
      Parameters:
      v - vertex
      Returns:
      incoming edges of v (edges that have v as target)

      Specified by:
      outgoingEdgesOf in interface Graph<V,E extends GraphEdge>
      Parameters:
      v - vertex
      Returns:
      outgoing edges of v (edges that have v as source)

      public Set<V> vertexSet()
      Specified by:
      vertexSet in interface Graph<V,E extends GraphEdge>
      Returns:
      collection of vertices in this graph (updated as the graph changes)

      public Set<E> edgeSet()

      Returns:
      collection of edges in this graph

    • removeAllVertices

      public void removeAllVertices(Collection<V> vertices)
      Description copied from interface: Graph
      Removes all specified vertices from this graph. Attached edges are also removed.
      Specified by:
      removeAllVertices in interface Graph<V,E extends GraphEdge>
      Parameters:
      vertices - vertices to remove
